operational_knowledge_units.title: Tote Config Model methods determine chute trigger settings
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that tote configuration determines what settings are used to trigger pickups, priority, or close chute behavior. The model includes a Method field with values Cube, Count, and CubeAndCount.
